heading: Acquisition and use of lands
label: 429b–1 Acquisition and use of lands
notes: Amendments1988—Subsec. (a). designated existing provisions as par. (1) and added par. (2).Pub. L. 100–647
amendments: Amendments1988—Subsec. (a). designated existing provisions as par. (1) and added par. (2).Pub. L. 100–647

children.heading: Acquisition of property or interests in property; scenic preservation of views
children.label: a Acquisition of property or interests in property; scenic preservation of views

children.text: In order to effectuate the purposes of sections 429b to 429b–5 of this title, the Secretary is authorized to acquire by donation, purchase with donated or appropriated funds or exchange, any property or interests therein which are located within the boundaries of the park, except that property owned by the Commonwealth of Virginia or by any political subdivision thereof may be acquired only by donation.

The Secretary shall cooperate with the Commonwealth of Virginia, the political subdivisions thereof, and other parties as designated by the Commonwealth or its political subdivisions in order to promote and achieve scenic preservation of views from within the park through zoning and such other means as the parties determine feasible.

children.heading: Acquisition of fee simple title with the consent of owner; hearing and review
children.label: b Acquisition of fee simple title with the consent of owner; hearing and review
children.text: With respect to areas within the 1954 boundaries of the park, as identified on the map referred to in , the Secretary may not acquire fee simple title to such areas without the consent of the owner so long as the lands continue to be devoted to a use which is the same as that in effect on . Further, if the Secretary proposes to acquire fee simple title to such property because of a change in use, the owner of such property may seek a review of the proposed acquisition of his or her property and is entitled to a hearing on the record in accordance with .section 429b of this titlesection 554 of title 5September 1, 1980

children.heading: Secretary authorized to make land available for Route 234 bypass
children.label: c Secretary authorized to make land available for Route 234 bypass
children.text: If the Virginia Department of Highways and Transportation determines that the proposed Route 234 bypass should be properly located between the Virginia Electric Power Company powerline easement and route 705, the Secretary shall make available the land necessary for such bypass, subject to such revisions, terms, and conditions as the Secretary deems are necessary and appropriate to assure that such bypass is located, constructed, operated, and maintained in a manner consistent with the administration of the park.

children.heading: Secretary not to close State roads
children.label: d Secretary not to close State roads
children.text: The Secretary may not close any State roads within the park unless action permitting the closing of such roads has been taken by appropriate officials of the Commonwealth of Virginia.
